message:
feat(validation): validate embedded labels and comments during import

Add two new IssueValidator methods:
- validate_embedded_labels(): runs LabelValidator on each embedded label
- validate_embedded_comments(): checks comment issue_id matches parent,
  runs CommentValidator, detects duplicate positive comment IDs

Tests: rejects invalid embedded labels, duplicate comment IDs, and
comments belonging to a different issue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
